channel.title: Posts on David Freitag
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on David Freitag

item.title: I quit my teaching job and built a career in tech. Here's how I did it.
item.description: I used to teach high school English. Now, I’m a Data Engineer at a Fortune 500 company.

item.title: An Introduction to David Freitag
item.description: Hello, I’m David Freitag. I am currently a Data Engineer at American Family Insurance.
